label: The Lumen Sump
description: The Lumen Sump occupies a recessed pressure-well off Radiance Current Port’s matte-clad concourses, its walls faced in light-absorbing composite scored with navigation hashmarks. Low guidance lamps sink into ribbed bulkheads, translating the hushlit particulate stream into slow, readable flow-maps across the ceiling. Booths and standing rails are built directly into the structure’s docking-frame geometry, with vibration baffles and sound-deadening panels that enforce the port’s characteristic quiet. A sealed service bar of dark ceramic and plated conduits dominates the interior, its fittings engineered for vacuum-rated resilience and rapid decontamination.
